name: pnp-copilot-pro-dev-da-executive-helper
title: Executive Helper - Meeting preparation with executive bios
shortDescription: A declarative agent that automates meeting preparation by generating comprehensive executive bios with career insights and rapport-building questions.
longDescription: A declarative agent that automates meeting preparation by generating comprehensive executive bios with career insights and rapport-building questions. The agent follows a structured 5-phase workflow: adaptive interview, comprehensive research, bio generation, optional summarization, and human-in-the-loop review.

thumbnails.alt: Executive Helper declarative agent generating executive bios
